title: En Usuru Ennai Vittu Lyrics Sengathu Boomiyile Song Lyrics

Singer: Reeta
Song: En Usuru Ennai Vittu
Movie: Sengathu Boomiyile
Music : Ilaiyaraaja

En Usuru Ennai Vittu ponnalum
Unna vittu pogathu
Theeyilathaan yen udambu vendhalum
Un ninaipu vegaaathu
Ennodu nenjukulla enna irndhadhunu
Ippo purinjale podhum

Sagadichu parthaaye
Nammoda oorgolam paakama nan ponen
Ennodu oorgolam ne paapiya
oor mala ennaenna paaru..
Un mala enmela podu..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song En Usuru Ennai Vittu expresses deep feelings of love and longing, reflecting the pain of separation.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Sengathu Boomiyile, this song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional turmoil.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Reeta and composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was the song released?

En Usuru Ennai Vittu was released on April 29, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Usuru Ennai Vittu, the listener is taken on an emotional journey through the lens of heartbreak and longing. The song beautifully encapsulates the feelings of loss and the struggle to let go, making it a poignant piece in the film Sengathu Boomiyile. With its soulful melody and heartfelt lyrics by Ilaiyaraaja, it evokes a deep sense of nostalgia and melancholy. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the hauntingly beautiful melody of En Usuru Ennai Vittu from the film Sengathu Boomiyile. This song, sung by the talented Reeta and composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja, captures the essence of love and longing. With its poignant lyrics and soulful composition, it resonates deeply with anyone who has faced heartbreak.
stanzaMeanings: I cannot let you go, even if I lose my life. Even if my body is burned, I cannot forget your thoughts. I now understand what has been in my heart for a long time.
I cannot let you go, even if I lose my life. Even if my body is burned, I cannot forget your thoughts.

I was waiting to bloom, oh golden flower. I was hoping to give life. Did you see me? I went to my village without telling anyone. Look at my village, oh sinner, look at what you have done to me. Put your flower on me.
I cannot let you go, even if I lose my life. Even if my body is burned, I cannot forget your thoughts. I now understand what has been in my heart for a long time.
I cannot let you go, even if I lose my life.
